body.title: Igor completes walks 11-20 autonomously — second validation batch
body.result: All cc-walk-11 through cc-walk-20 verified closed — Igor walked 20 tasks autonomously
body.description:
Second batch of 10 autonomous walk tickets (T-cc-walk-11 through T-cc-walk-20). First batch (walks 1-10) all completed successfully. This batch validates Igor can sustain autonomous delivery across a wider range of subsystems: engrams, cognition safety, discord infra, paths abstraction, reading pipeline.

CC monitors each run, intercepts bad proposals, verifies commits. Success = all 10 closed with Igor as author.

**Affected files:** queue.json (ticket state), various Igor subsystem files per child tickets.
**Design rules:** none apply — coordination ticket.
**Scope boundary:** IN — T-cc-walk-11 through T-cc-walk-20. OUT — redesigning pe_chain, Igor's full queue autonomy beyond these 10.
**Test plan:** all 10 child walk tickets reach done; each closed by Igor.
**Pass condition:** `cc_queue.py list | grep 'T-cc-walk-1[1-9]\|T-cc-walk-20' | grep -c closed` returns 10.
